commit_scope: Express the ideas router as a high-level Form route recipe while keeping FastAPI as the carrier.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_governance_health.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py
git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.summary: docs/coherence-substrate/ideas-router.form now expresses api/app/routers/ideas.py as a route recipe without changing the live router. The Form artifact names the route shape, route recipe shape, ten shifted route recipe families, and GAP-I1 for native front-door dispatch. Focused Form proof plus governance route tests pass; ruff is clean for the new proof file. The branch rebased cleanly and worktree_pr_guard returned ready_for_push=True.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted in this local Form embodiment slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The ideas API keeps existing route behavior while docs/coherence-substrate/ideas-router.form exposes a source-backed high-level choreography for route families and carrier boundaries.

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py
